title: Welcome to Summit 2026!
body: We are excited to welcome you to Connection Point Church for this year's Summit. Doors open and registration begins Monday at 8:00 AM.

title: Plan your week
body: Browse the three-day Schedule, pick your Tuesday breakouts from the catalog, and check Where to Eat for options in Jackson and Cape Girardeau.

title: Welcome to Summit!
body: 👋 Welcome to Summit! Registration opens at 8:00 AM. We're excited you're here!

title: General Association at 10:00
body: General Association begins at 10:00 AM. Make your way to the auditorium—we'll get started soon.

title: Session 1 this afternoon
body: Session One is almost here! Join us for an incredible afternoon of worship followed by a keynote from Vince Daniel.

title: Dinner break
body: Enjoy dinner! We'll gather back together for the evening session at 7:00 PM.

title: Tonight at 7:00 PM
body: We're back tonight at 7:00 PM! Join us for a powerful evening of worship and a message from Clint Cook. You won't want to miss what's in store!

title: Thanks for a great first day
body: Thanks for a great first day! Tomorrow begins with Breakfast with Missionaries at 7:30 AM, followed by Session 3 at 9:00 AM.

title: Breakfast with Missionaries
body: ☕ Good morning! Breakfast with Missionaries begins at 7:30 AM in the Civic Center Gym.

title: Session 3 at 9:00 AM
body: Session 3 begins at 9:00 AM. Grab your coffee and join us for a great morning together.

title: Super Sessions at 11:00
body: Super Sessions begin at 11:00 AM. Head to your selected training location—we'll see you there!

title: Breakout Sessions at 1:30
body: Breakout Sessions begin at 1:30 PM. Check the app if you need room locations.

title: Dinner break
body: Enjoy dinner! We'll gather again at 7:00 PM for worship, the keynote, and our Commissioning Service.

title: Tonight: Commissioning Service
body: Join us at 7:00 PM for worship, a keynote from Dr. Danny Dunivan, and our special Commissioning Service as we celebrate those answering God's call.

title: Thank you for today
body: Thank you for joining us today! Tomorrow's CLN Teaching Sessions begin at 9:00 AM.

title: CLN Teaching Sessions at 9:00
body: Good morning! CLN Teaching Sessions begin at 9:00 AM. Let's finish Summit strong!

title: Thank you!
body: Thank you for being part of Summit 2026. We're grateful you joined us!
